title: MarketplacePack
description: Velocity Marketplace pack manifest (pack.md). Defines a versioned, distributable bundle of agents, skills, workflows, guardrails, or domain knowledge.

id.description: Globally unique pack identifier. Use kebab-case. Must be unique in the registry.

type.description: Pack type. Determines how contents are installed and activated.

description.description: Short description of what this pack provides (1–3 sentences).

license.description: SPDX license identifier (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0, CC-BY-4.0).

velocity_version_min.description: Minimum Velocity version required to install this pack (major.minor).

velocity_version_max.description: Maximum Velocity version compatible with this pack. Omit if no upper bound.

homepage.description: Pack homepage URL (GitHub repo, docs site, etc.).

changelog.description: Path to CHANGELOG.md within the pack, or a URL.

dependencies.description: Other Velocity packs this pack depends on. Installed automatically.

conflicts.description: Packs that conflict with this one. Installation blocked if any are active.

signals.description: Detection signals used by Project Intelligence to auto-recommend this pack.

contents.description: What is included in this pack.

verified.description: True if this is an official Velocity-maintained pack.

optional.description: If true, installation continues even if this dependency cannot be resolved.

Signals.description: Project Intelligence signals that trigger an auto-recommendation for this pack.

file_patterns.description: Glob patterns. If any match, recommend this pack.

import_patterns.description: Source code import/require strings. Matched against all source files.

context_md_terms.description: CONTEXT.md terms that indicate this domain is active.

stack.description: Stack.md field matches that trigger recommendation.

dependency_names.description: Package names in package.json / pom.xml / requirements.txt etc. that indicate this pack is relevant.

Contents.description: Files and capabilities included in this pack.

path.description: Path to the CONTEXT.md template within the pack.

bounded_context.description: Which bounded context this CONTEXT.md seeds.

merge_strategy.description: How to apply this template when a CONTEXT.md already exists. 'propose' writes a context-proposal instead of overwriting.

skills.description: SKILL.md files included in this pack.

agents.description: Agent definitions included in this pack.

workflows.description: Workflow prompt sequences included in this pack.

path.description: Path to the guardrails YAML file within the pack.

merge_strategy.description: How to merge pack guardrails with existing .velocity/guardrails/.

grill_seeds.description: Domain-specific question seeds injected into grill-with-docs and grill-me when this pack is active.

path.description: Path to SKILL.md within the pack.

replaces.description: ID of a built-in Velocity skill this pack skill overrides.

path.description: Path to agent YAML within the pack.

role.description: How this agent integrates with the Velocity agent hierarchy.

path.description: Path to workflow prompt template within the pack.

destination.description: Override the default installation destination directory.

post_install_skill.description: Skill ID to invoke automatically after installation (e.g. to seed CONTEXT.md).

requires_regeneration.description: If true, the marketplace skill triggers adapter regeneration after install.
